title: licaria terminalis
intro: Licaria terminalis, also known as the white copahu, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's roots contain a sap that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, which has been found to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Licaria terminalis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat fungal and bacterial infections. Licaria terminalis is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and provide relief from a range of health issues.
